$comment: Reviewed, intentional divergences from the C# reference (m0lte/packet.net). Every entry is a decision with a reason — scripts/parity-check.mjs treats anything NOT listed here as drift and fails CI. Remove an entry when the TS counterpart lands. Scope note: the listener-surface comparison covers C# public METHODS and EVENTS; C# read-only properties (MyCall, IsRunning, ActiveSessions, CurrentSessionParameters, AcceptIncoming) are deliberately outside the extractor — they are inspection conveniences, not behaviour.

listenerOptions.RestartT1OnTxComplete: TX-complete→T1: re-arms a running T1 from the TNC's ACKMODE TX-completion echo (packet.net kiss.t1FromTxComplete). The echo is a TNC/node-host transport capability; no TS transport implements SendFrameWithAckAsync today, so the option would be inert. Add the TS leg when an ACKMODE-capable TS transport exists.

listenerSurface.UpdateSessionParameters: Live per-listener reseed is driven by packet.net's node-host hot-reload; browser consumers reconstruct the listener instead. Revisit if a TS host needs hot reconfig.
listenerSurface.AddLocalAlias: Multi-callsign acceptance (the node answers for app callsigns registered by packet.net's RHPv2 server, e.g. a DAPPS instance's callsign). Node-host capability; a browser consumer constructs one listener per identity instead. TS leg tracked as a follow-up if a TS host needs it.
listenerSurface.RemoveLocalAlias: Pair of AddLocalAlias — see that entry.
